title: Salary Amendments. The LMA is required to promptly inform the
content: 45 Department of any proposed change or adjustment in the wage scale, as well as any 46 modifications to the vessel's CBA coverage or affiliation, if applicable. Any wage 47 adjustment should be compliant with pertinent and applicable laws, rules, and regulations, 48 provided that any agreement between the Principal/employer and the Union pertaining to 49 wage adjustment in the wage scale pursuant to prevailing international standards shall 50 be deemed a compliance of this provision. 51 52
